text_truncated: Last summer I took the train to Rotterdam, met a friend near the station, and we spent the afternoon by the river before heading home.
I arrived late to family dinner because my bike tire went flat on the way, so I had to walk the rest of the distance.
A few years ago I visited a small museum on a rainy day, bought a postcard in the gift shop, and later had coffee nearby.
I told my colleague I had submitted the report that morning, but I was still revising the final section and had not sent it yet.
